# V2 retention read

## TL;DR

V2 lifted the headline metric by **+6.4pp** in the mature cohort.

## Body — mature-cohort table

| arm | rate | delta |
|---|---|---|
| control | 31.2% | — |
| V2 | 39.6% | **+8.4pp** |

The +8.4pp figure is the mature-cohort difference between V2 and
control.

## Methodology

Mature cohort is the strict-mature cohort defined as members past the
full conversion window on the day of the read.
